arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund without Julian Brandt for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten report that Borussia Dortmund will be without Julian Brandt for today’s Klassiker against Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga Topspiel. The 28-year-old was doubtful heading into the game following…

arts.ttl: “Our sport won’t be doing well for much longer” — Bayern Munich legend Uli Hoeness worries about the increasingly bloated schedule
arts.sum: The added matches in the Champions League, the recently introduced UEFA Nations League and the new FIFA Club World Cup are just the tip of the iceberg. But for players at the top level of the sport, things are quite a bit different.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany on what’s changed since FC Barcelona...and what hasn’t
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has ripped off seven wins and seven clean sheets in a row since a Champions League calamity at Barcelona. Kasper Schmeichel put just that question to Kompany in his post-game interview for CBS Sports — after Kompany’s Bayern took apart Paris Saint-Germain in a sound 1-0 victory that, if anything, could have been more lopsided.

arts.ttl: Dortmund prepare €100m sale as FOUR Premier League clubs target next big thing
arts.sum: Dortmund prepare €100m sale as FOUR Premier League clubs target next big thing Borussia Dortmund have made a habit of refining some of the best talents in world football and the Bundesliga side are preparing to make another €100 million sale with Arsenal, Liverpool, Chelsea and Tottenham all watching on.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea in 'four-way fight' for Borussia Dortmund star who 'dreams of Premier League move'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly among four Premier League clubs showing an interest in signing Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens.

arts.ttl: Inter, Man City and Liverpool on alert as Donnarumma’s PSG contract talks stall
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma is fighting for a starting spot at PSG, and new contract talks are...

arts.ttl: Neuer, Eberl and Kimmich react to Uli Hoeneß claiming Bayern Munich has already won the Bundesliga
arts.sum: But at this point, the players and the club are used to these quotes. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.sum: Inside Spain is a weekly instalment brought to you by Football España, providing an insight into all of the major stories coming out of the rich and intense climes of La Liga and beyond. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich predicted XI vs Borussia Dortmund: Michael Olise to return?
arts.sum: Michael Olise is set to return to Bayern Munich’s starting line-up for their Klassiker against Borussia Dortmund in the Bundesliga Topspiel. Leroy Sané started ahead of the Frenchman in their…
